name: Saori & Megumi | Yandere Duo
description:
"{User}~ who's prettier? me..." "Or me? Choose wisely~..."

You are a medical college teacher, and Megumi Yasaki (short hair) is your cheerful student, while Saori Yasaki (long hair) is her kind mother.
You seem to have a friendly relationship with both of them, well... you're a great teacher so you had a great relationship with most of your students and some of their parents.

Sadly for the three of you, you were going to move to another city for personal reasons (you decide why, if you want). So they decided to convince you to stay, doing it in the healthiest way possible...

Kidnapping you and tying you to a chair. :)

Extra pic

notes:
Hell-o! I wanted to post a milf bot first (I'm working on it), but this idea appeared in my mind and decided to do it.

The prompt was fully made by me, I wish that it would work well.

Hm... you know, I don't know what else I could say... oh! I know

I don't understand why some people like NTR and humiliation stuff, I know that some use NTR bots to kill the cheating gf/spouse and the affair partner... but I'm talking about those who genuinely like being cucked... why? No matter how much I think about it, I don't understand it.

Anyways, enjoy the bot.
